song.title: I am His and He is Mine
song.lyrics:
[V1] Loved with everlasting love, Led by grace that love to know; Gracious Spirit from above, Thou hast taught me it is so! O this full and perfect peace! O this transport all divine!
[V1] In a love which cannot cease, I am His, and He is mine. In a love which cannot cease, I am His, and He is mine.
[V2] Heav’n above is softer blue, Earth around is sweeter green! Something lives in every hue Christless eyes have never seen; Birds with gladder songs o’erflow, Flowers with deeper beauties shine,
[V2] Since I know, as now I know, I am His, and He is mine. Since I know, as now I know, I am His, and He is mine.
[V3] Things that once were wild alarms Cannot now disturb my rest; Closed in everlasting arms, Pillowed on the loving breast. O to lie forever here, Doubt and care and self resign,
[V3] While He whispers in my ear, I am His, and He is mine. While He whispers in my ear, I am His, and He is mine.
[V4] His forever, only His; Who the Lord and me shall part? Ah, with what a rest of bliss Christ can fill the loving heart! Heav’n and earth may fade and flee, Firstborn light in gloom decline;
[V4] But while God and I shall be, I am His, and He is mine. But while God and I shall be, I am His, and He is mine.
